## Summary



## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest app/tests -q` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds with no new errors (frontend)
- [ ] No real, non-synthetic case data added anywhere in the repository
- [ ] Rule changes (if any) include a `rule_id`, `weight`, `rationale`, and a `CHANGELOG.md` / `docs/methodology.md` entry
- [ ] User-facing text avoids adjudicative or guaranteed-outcome language
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
